calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: JPT Michael Dickstein, Clerk Karissa Shaw, not reported. (525)

APPEARANCES:
David B. Golden appearing for appellants Tiffany Roe and Jason Roe (Appellants also present).
Respondent Steve Walz for Robert DBA Walz Properties.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

The court hears argument from counsel on factual issues of the case; i.e. security deposit, rental agreement and possible fees owed by appellants.

The following exhibits were marked and admitted into evidence;
Appellant's Exhibit #A - Carbon copy of Security Deposit Refund for 2120 Pacific Apartments, dated 6/13/06, 1 page.

Respondent's Exhibit #1 - Original Security Deposit Refund form with copies of receipts and original lease agreement attached, 12 pages.

Respondent's Exhibit #2 - Copy of Residential Tenancy Agreement, dated 5/11/05, 2 pages.

Respondent's Exhibit #3 - Letter from Roe to Walz, dated 4/1/06, 4 pages.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JUDGMENT RENDERED.
